comment: Mapping between game scenarios and SCEN.DAT chunks. Derived from chunk content and structure: battle chunk K holds scenario K's battle plus its post-battle HQ dialogue; scene_a (44+K) plays before the battle, scene_b (86+K) after it. SCEN2.DAT differs from SCEN.DAT only inside battle chunks (variant unit layouts); all text is identical.

tutorial_battle.note: virtual battle launched from the quiz
